title: paeonia × suffruticosa var. humei
intro: Paeonia × suffruticosa var. humei, also known as the Tree Peony, is a deciduous perennial plant that belongs to the Paeoniaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic compounds, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and anxiety. The health benefits of Paeonia × suffruticosa var. humei include reducing pain and inflammation, improving sleep quality, and regulating menstrual cycles. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
